title: aotus coccinea
intro: Aotus coccinea, also known as Red Flowering Aotus or Red Aotus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds that have been shown to have health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Aotus coccinea can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
